markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content production, technical issues, and 2026 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Production Accelerated:** Delivering 14 articles this week to create a holiday buffer for Vivek's OOO dates (Dec 22–Jan 5, Jan 12–16).](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**Critical CMS Bug:** A bug in the Notum CMS is preventing comparison pages from publishing. The fix requires Growth X to generate missing `CM` field data, which is blocked until early January.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**2026 Strategy Aligned:** Content will focus on Strapi's frontend flexibility (e.g., UI libraries) to position it as the ideal backend for frontend developers.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
  - [**Performance Strong:** Overall traffic is healthy, though LLM-related traffic is slightly sluggish—a common trend this December. SEO rankings remain dominant.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)

## Topics

### Technical Issues & Blockers

  - [**Notum CMS Bug:** Comparison pages fail to publish or update, causing page breaks.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Root Cause:** Missing data in the `CM` field, which populates the page's technology breakdown.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Growth X will generate the missing data.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Blocked until early January due to the relevant team member's OOO schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [**Comparison Page Table:** The task to remove the table from comparison pages is a lower priority for Notum and is pending.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)

### Content Production & Holiday Schedule

  - [**Production:** 7 articles delivered last week; 14 articles due this week.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**Rationale:** To create a content buffer for the holiday season.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**Growth X OOO Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [**Vivek:** Dec 22–Jan 5 & Jan 12–16 (available for emergencies via Slack).](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [**Usman:** Available next week (until Dec 25) and in January.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)

### 2026 Content Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Align content with Strapi's marketing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
  - [**Paul's Focus (Strapify):** Showcase Strapi's flexibility with various UI libraries and frameworks.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Position Strapi as the ideal backend for frontend developers, enabling them to build user-facing products without deep backend expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [**Alignment:** This focus is already reflected in the new list of integration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [**Growth X Priorities (Jan):**](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
      - [Integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
      - [Page refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
      - [New persona: Agency owner](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
      - [Continued focus: Developer persona](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)

### Performance & SEO

  - [**Traffic:** Strong session numbers, despite December being a typically slow month.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:** Slightly sluggish, but this is a common trend across many accounts this December.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
      - [**Action:** Running page audits in Scrunch to proactively check for issues, though none are expected.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [**SEO:** No significant changes in Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
      - **Rankings:** Strapi holds \#1 position for nearly all tracked queries.
      - [**Sentiment:** High at 92%.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

      - [Queue approved integration pages for production.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
      - [Propose new topics for the "agency owner" persona by early January.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [**Theo:**](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
      - [Share the Google Sheet of approved integration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [**Paul:**](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
      - [Follow up with Notum on the comparison page table removal task.](https://fathom.video/share/vvz8J9CFDHBtGzMAwbTjzDC9wza-XRNu?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
